ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "sex_female" INTEGER /* Gender of the passenger (1 = Female, 0 = Male) */,
  "sex_male" INTEGER /* Gender of the passenger (1 = Male, 0 = Female) */,
  "embarked_from" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (e.g., C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number for the passenger */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number for the passenger */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total number of family members on board (including the passenger) */,
  "is_alone" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger was traveling alone (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger (e.g., Mr, Mrs, Miss, Master) */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the passenger's cabin was located */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "travel_companions" TEXT /* Travel companions of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_from FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_from") REFERENCES ports ("port_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_factors" (
  "survival_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival factor */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the survival factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_factors_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_features" (
  "cabin_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin feature */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the cabin feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the cabin feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_features_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabin_details ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_details" (
  "ticket_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket detail */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of ticket purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_details_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "user_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data access, search, download) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "data_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of update */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of user who made update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "project_contributors" TEXT /* Contributors to the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  "actions_performed" TEXT /* Actions performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port (e.g., Cherbourg, Queenstown, Southampton) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port (e.g., France, Ireland, England) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number for the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger class */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number for the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_details_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
